name: hud_ui_loading_checkpoint_init_table
description: HudUiLoadingCheckpoint::InitTable initializes the 19 raw checkpoint-second values, resets the current index, stores max index 18, and fills normalized progress as raw * progress scale.
known_limits: Binary Ninja reconstruction is limited by the raw/normalized two-array cursor relationship in the x87 normalization loop, but assembly and current smoke evidence agree on the table contract.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through hud_ui_mgr_trigger_current_layout_on_activated; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the HUD loading-checkpoint cluster.
